label: 随机POI分布
description: 在网格指定区域值上随机散布兴趣点（POI），支持单网格、多值网格、网格列表三种输入格式，输出格式与输入保持一致。
description-en: Randomly scatters Points of Interest onto cells matching specified target values; supports single grid, multi-value grid, and grid-list inputs, preserving the input format in output.
icon: 深色网格上散落若干彩色小圆点标记，每种颜色对应一类POI，圆点周围留有最小间距，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: grid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 输入网格列表 (number[][][])，也支持单网格 (number[][]) 自动包装
inputs.description-en: Input list of 2D grids (number[][][]); single grid is auto-wrapped.

inputs.name: poiRules
inputs.label: POI规则列表
inputs.description: POI规则数组，简化格式 [{名称: "targetValue:count:minDistance"}, ...]，如 [{"洞穴": "7:4:12"}, {"营火": "4:8:6"}]；也兼容旧格式 [{decoration, targetValue, count, minDistance}]
inputs.description-en: Array of POI rules; simplified [{name: "targetValue:count:minDistance"}, ...] e.g. [{"cave": "7:4:12"}]; legacy {decoration, targetValue, count, minDistance} also accepted.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0表示使用当前时间自动随机

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: 输出网格列表
outputs.description: 单值网格的平铺列表：每种POI一张，仅含该id与0；与 outputNameList 一一对应
outputs.description-en: Flat list of single-value grids: one per POI type (only that id or 0); aligned 1:1 with outputNameList.

outputs.name: outputNameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 与 outputGridList 一一对应的拍平名称清单，格式为 [{id, name, type}]，type 固定为 asset
outputs.description-en: Flat name list aligned 1:1 with outputGridList: [{id, name, type}], type is always "asset".

outputs.name: placedCount
outputs.label: 成功放置数量
outputs.description: 所有规则中成功放置的POI点总数
outputs.description-en: Total number of POI points successfully placed across all rules.
